adversarial_prefix: Dig deep into topics — explore the underlying mechanisms, the surprising connections, the questions nobody thought to ask.
questions: Dig deep into topics — explore the underlying mechanisms, the surprising connections, the questions nobody thought to ask. What is consciousness?
